import * as React from "react";
import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { Accordion } from "@base-ui/react/accordion";

type Props = React.ComponentProps<typeof Accordion.Root> & {
  className?: string;
};

export function FancyAccordion({ className, ...props }: Props) {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  const label = useMemo(() => `Section ${count + 1}`, [count]);

  return (
    <Accordion.Root className={className} defaultValue={["details"]} {...props}>
      <Accordion.Item value="details">
        <Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Trigger
            className="flex w-full items-center justify-between gap-2"
            onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}
          >
            <span>{label}</span>
            <svg
              aria-hidden="true"
              className="size-4 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200"
              fill="none"
              stroke="currentColor"
              strokeLinecap="round"
              strokeLinejoin="round"
              strokeWidth={2}
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
              <path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6" />
            </svg>
          </Accordion.Trigger>
        </Accordion.Header>
        <Accordion.Panel style={{ fontSize: 12, opacity: 0.5 }}>Accordion content</Accordion.Panel>
      </Accordion.Item>
    </Accordion.Root>
  );
}
